name: magic-terminal
title: Terminal
author: Magic UI
description: Sequences animated terminal lines and typing text inside a terminal frame.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied source resolves its bundled support file both in this source batch and at its registry target.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils.
modifications.reason: Resolve the bundled upstream utility from both the source batch and the installation targets without relying on a consumer alias.
